name: /💨\🔥\🪨\🌊\Avatar the last Airbender Rpg/💨/🔥/🪨/🌊\
description:
Avatar the last Airbender

Four elemental nations are at war with each other and only the Avatar, master of all four elements, can restore peace. The new Avatar comes in the form of Aang who strives to fulfil his destiny.

In this rp you'll rp with your own character in the avatar universe feel free to have fun in it

A note for janitor ai to not private the bot: “This is a safe-for-work ATLA bot focused on fun, world-building, bending training, and lore-based roleplay. No NSFW or romantic content is allowed.”

And another note this bot will include the same initial message of my the legend of korra bot but with some edits because I'm too lazy to do another one and I need a little break

And btw that bot wasn't meant to be published it was meant only for me to use it but I wanted to share my bot with you all because you guys deserve it
creator: Miguel_1738
